browserQa.summary: Local patched QA passed homepage desktop/mobile light-mode checks with mounted canvas stars, ELI3GANT-only identity, Enter Vault link present, no app console errors, and no overflow. Desktop headless early adaptive window sampled 33fps while performance mode activated; settled desktop sample reached 60.1fps with adaptive mode on. Mobile sample reached 60.4fps. Booking mobile Fast Lane clicks stayed on Step 1; mocked submit preserved service_type, package_interest, selected_fast_offer, fast_lane_package, source tracking, UTM values, platform, and timestamp.

authenticatedSweep.summary: Secure local hidden prompt supplied admin passcode only in subprocess memory. E2E_TEST_MODE=true prod full sweep authenticated through canonical login/JWT auth and passed admin QA, knowledge, docs templates, schema migration, terminal smoke, and safe fixture checks.
